name.ja: <ruby>報<rt>ほう</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt>どう</rt></ruby><ruby>合<rt>かっ</rt></ruby><ruby>戦<rt>せん</rt></ruby>スクーピーズ［<ruby>Ｌ<rt>エル</rt></ruby>］

requirement.en: Declare 1 card type (Monster, Spell, or Trap).

effect.en: Your opponent excavates the top card of their Deck. If it was the declared card type, gain 400 LP. If this card is in Maximum Mode, you can also destroy 1 card on your opponent's field. Your opponent places the excavated card on the top of their Deck.
